title: Clean Up Metrics Analyst Results Widget — Hide IDs and Fix Table Overflow
story: As a DataTools Pro user reviewing Metrics Analyst results, I want internal IDs hidden and the table properly contained within the widget, so that the interface is clean and I can scroll through all data without overflow issues.
description:
The Metrics Analyst results widget needs cleanup:

1. Hide the report ID column — end users should not see internal Salesforce IDs.
2. Move the Add/Ignore action buttons to the leftmost column.
3. Add a horizontal scrollbar so the table fits within the widget boundaries instead of overflowing.
4. Review column distribution to determine which columns to show or hide.
acceptance_criteria: Report ID column is hidden from the results table
Dashboard ID column is hidden from the results table
Add/Ignore action buttons are in the leftmost column
Table has a horizontal scrollbar when content exceeds widget width
No table content overflows outside the widget boundaries
ux_changes: Hidden internal ID columns (report ID, dashboard ID) from the results table. Moved action buttons to leftmost column. Added horizontal scrollbar to contain the table within the widget.
implementation_notes: Developer hid the dashboard ID column and confirmed no user IDs were displayed. Ready for review except for potential user ID clarification.
comment_summary: Developer asked for clarification on which IDs to hide. Confirmed it was the dashboard ID, not user IDs. Hid the ID column and made it reversible.
